description: Used often for a way of entering and exiting an Avatar Anchor when the user wants to.

fields.Anchor: The anchor to enter after confirming the enter anchor.
fields.EnterText: The text for when the user is being prompted to enter the anchor.
fields.ExitText: The text for when the user is being prompted to exit the anchor.
fields.Enter: Whether to allow this component to be used for entering the anchor.
fields.Exit: Whether to allow this component to be used for exiting the anchor.
fields.Vibrate: What kind of haptics vibration feedback to send to the user's controller when bringing up the enter or exiting prompt.

methods.OnEnterConfirm: Handles a user clicking on the anchor and confirming they want to enter.
methods.OnExitConfirm: Handles a user clicking on the anchor and confirming they want to exit.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: This needs a collider on the same slot to allow for clicking and bringing up the prompt. The ``EnterText`` and ``ExitText`` fields are usually driven by a component. The component automatically translates the dialogues for them in their context menu to their selected locale language.
